text:
Hawaii Standard Time (HST) is UTC-10.  
Australia/Sydney (AEDT/AEST) is UTC+10 or UTC+11 depending on DST.  
September 23 is likely outside DST in Sydney (DST starts early October), so Sydney is UTC+10.  
Time difference: 10 - (-10) = 20 hours ahead.  
9 PM HST + 20 hours = 17:00 next day (September 24).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 2024-09-24 17:00
